LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT TREATS THIS MATTER AS MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS INSTEAD OF A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, AND VACATES THE TENTATIVE RULING AND RULES AS FOLLOWS: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED, WITH 15 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD THE FACTS OF ESTOPPEL. ALL EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS ARE OVERRULED. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: TAMARA WILLAT-HARRISON, CSR #4609

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION DENIED. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RAISED REGARDING ESTOPPEL. SEE ELMORE VS. OAK VALLEY HOSPITAL DISTRICT (1988) 204 CAL.APP.3D 716. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RAISED WHETHER INADEQUATELY LIT STAIRWAY AND ENDING OF THE HANDRAIL CREATED A DANGEROUS CONDITION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR 5797

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-25-2009 Denied
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Aaron Gorfein, Esq. of the Law Office of Elizabeth F. McDonald (415) 512-7788 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Eugene Elliot, Esq. of Bertrand, Fox & Elliot (415) 353-0999 appearing for Defendant and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. Triable issue of fact raised regarding estoppel. See Elmore vs. Oak Valley Hospital District (1988) 204 Cal.App.3d 716. Triable issue of fact raised whether inadequately lit stairway and ending of the handrail created a dangerous condition. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-11-2009 Continued To Sep-25-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: Eugene B. Elliot, of Bertrand, Fox & Elliot, (415) 353-0999 appearing for Defendants and moving party. Hearing held. The Court modified its tentative ruling. Due to counsel's scheduling conflict and agreement of the parties, the hearing for summary judgment is continued to September 25, 2009, opposing party to provide courtesy copies with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.
